label: extract_statistical_features
peekOfCode:
def extract_statistical_features(image):
    image = cv2.resize(image, IMAGE_SIZE)
    features = []
    gray = cv2.cvtColor(image, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    features.append(np.mean(gray))
    features.append(np.std(gray))
    for i in range(3):
        channel = image[:, :, i]
        features.append(np.mean(channel))
        features.append(np.std(channel))

def create_tree_graphviz(model, class_names):
    feature_names = []
    for b in range(BLOCKS[0]*BLOCKS[1]):
        feature_names.extend([f'block_{b}_R', f'block_{b}_G', f'block_{b}_B'])
    dot_data = export_graphviz(
        model,
        out_file=None,
        feature_names=feature_names,
        class_names=class_names,
        filled=True,

def plot_confusion_matrix(ax, cm, class_names, title):
    cmap = plt.cm.Blues
    sns.heatmap(
        cm,
        annot=True,
        fmt=".2f",
        cmap=cmap,
        cbar=True,
        xticklabels=class_names,
        yticklabels=class_names,
